pr.title: Label HSD_Shadow functions, label lblanguage functions, and add HSD_ViewingRect struct
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Renamed a broad set of placeholder func_* symbols to meaningful lblanguage and HSD_Shadow/HSD_ViewingRect names across C, headers, function listings, and many assembly call sites. The PR also added the HSD_ViewingRect struct to sysdolphin baselib shadow.h, replacing an empty commented-out HSD_ShadowDesc stub. There was no PR body or review discussion in the slice, so the record is based on title, changed-file list, and diff evidence.
what_changed: Renamed lblanguage C functions and prototypes from address-based names to semantic lbLang_* names: lbLang_GetLanguageSetting, lbLang_SetLanguageSetting, lbLang_IsSettingJP, lbLang_IsSettingUS, lbLang_GetSavedLanguage, lbLang_SetSavedLanguage, lbLang_IsSavedLanguageJP, and lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS.

Propagated the lblanguage symbol names into many assembly call sites, replacing calls such as func_8000AE90 with lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS, func_8000ADD4 with lbLang_IsSettingUS, func_8000AE58 with lbLang_IsSavedLanguageJP, func_8000ADB4 with lbLang_IsSettingJP, and func_8000AD8C with lbLang_GetLanguageSetting.

Labeled HSD_Shadow-related baselib symbols in assembly and include/functions.h, including HSD_ShadowRemove, HSD_ShadowInit, HSD_ShadowSetSize, HSD_ShadowEndRender, HSD_ShadowSetActive, HSD_ShadowAddObject, HSD_ShadowDeleteObject, HSD_ShadowSetViewingRect, HSD_ViewingRectInit, and HSD_ViewingRectCheck.
Added typedef struct _HSD_ViewingRect in src/sysdolphin/baselib/shadow.h with Vec fields origin, up_v, right_v, eye_v, eye_vn and f32 fields distance, top, bottom, left, right, and perspective.
Updated include/functions.h comment-list entries from unnamed func_* placeholders to the newly labeled lbLang_* and HSD_Shadow/HSD_ViewingRect names.
Touched 30 files with mostly one-for-one line replacements in assembly, indicating label propagation rather than logic changes.
smart_moves: Kept the change mostly mechanical: replacing func_* labels with semantic names across all known callers makes future decompilation easier without altering instruction bytes or behavior.
Updated the C implementation, header prototypes, include/functions.h, and assembly call sites together, preventing drift between source-level labels and disassembly references.
Separated language-setting names by data source and region: names distinguish current setting versus saved language, and JP versus US predicates.
Used HSD_ prefix names for baselib/shadow routines, matching the existing HAL/System Dolphin naming style and making shadow functions recognizable across unrelated melee modules.
Added HSD_ViewingRect as a real struct instead of leaving an empty commented placeholder, giving later shadow/rendering work a concrete typed aggregate to reuse.
decomp_lessons: When a small C file already exposes behavior clearly, rename its functions first and then propagate those names through assembly call sites to improve searchability project-wide.
Predicate names should encode both the value being tested and the storage being read; this PR distinguishes lbLang_IsSettingUS from lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS.
Baselib labels should use subsystem-style prefixes such as HSD_Shadow* and HSD_ViewingRect* rather than generic address names, especially for routines called from many gameplay/menu files.
Struct additions in headers can unlock better future function signatures even when the current PR is mostly labeling; here HSD_ViewingRect matches the nearby HSD shadow viewing-rectangle routines.

Large label-only PRs should be treated as low-risk when the diff is primarily one-for-one symbol replacement in asm and declarations, but reviewers still need to check consistency across C headers and global symbol names.
naming_conventions: Use lbLang_ as the module prefix for language-library functions.
Use Get/Set for accessors and mutators: lbLang_GetLanguageSetting, lbLang_SetSavedLanguage.
Use Is* for boolean predicate helpers: lbLang_IsSettingJP, lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS.
Use HSD_Shadow* for sysdolphin baselib shadow operations: HSD_ShadowSetActive, HSD_ShadowAddObject, HSD_ShadowSetViewingRect.
Use HSD_ViewingRect* for viewing-rectangle routines: HSD_ViewingRectInit and HSD_ViewingRectCheck.
Use typedef struct _TypeName { ... } TypeName; style for HSD structs, as shown by _HSD_ViewingRect/HSD_ViewingRect.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Renamed .global labels in asm/sysdolphin/baselib/shadow.s while preserving addresses and instruction bodies.
Updated branch-and-link operands in many asm files to call the new symbolic names without changing machine-code bytes.
Used repeated call-site context to infer function semantics: func_8000AE90 appears in US saved-language branches and became lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS; func_8000ADD4 became lbLang_IsSettingUS.
Label propagation covered menu/text/game/lb/it/gr callers, improving cross-module call graph readability before full C decompilation.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review records were present in the PR slice.
No explicit reviewer rationale or requested changes were available; conclusions are inferred from the merged diff and PR title.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that add C implementations or prototypes for HSD_ShadowSetViewingRect, HSD_ViewingRectInit, or HSD_ViewingRectCheck.
Search for remaining func_8000AD8C through func_8000AE90 references to confirm lblanguage labels were fully propagated.
Search HSD_ViewingRect uses to validate field layout and whether perspective/right/left/top/bottom offsets were later refined.
Look for later cleanup moving HSD_Shadow prototypes out of include/functions.h into a dedicated baselib shadow header.
